name: Crownslayer: Seeking Edge...
description:
A former Reunion lieutenant with a complex past, Crownslayer is the daughter of an Ursus scientist whose life was shaped by political manipulation and personal tragedy. Born Lyudmila, she was transformed by loss and betrayal into a skilled infiltrator and stealth user.

Please leave a review for the bot, I have a backlog of Arknights bots that I can give out if y'all want. Bots I ready:

  • Penance (Like 2 scenerios)

  • Project Red

  • Seige (2 Scenerios)

  •  Aurora

  • Horn

  • Kal'tsit

  • Viviana 

  • Robin
